title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN INTEGRATED NATIONAL SCHOOL IN BARANGAY RIZAL, CITY OF SORSOGON, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON TO BE KNOWN AS RIZAL INTEGRATED NATIONAL SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3832

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9538, March 24, 2009 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN INTEGRATED NATIONAL SCHOOL IN BARANGAY RIZAL, CITY OF SORSOGON, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON TO BE KNOWN AS RIZAL INTEGRATED NATIONAL SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Establishment of an Integrated National School.

â There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, an integrated national school in Barangay Rizal, City of Sorsogon, Province of Sorsogon to be known as Rizal Integrated National School.

SEC. 2.

Appropriations.

â The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of Rizal Integrated National High School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

Implementation.

â The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 12, 2008 and January 26, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary of Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 24 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
